heading: IMPROVEMENTS
operative_text: Except as provided by Subsections (b) through (f), an improvement may be listed in the name of the owner of the land on which the improvement is located.

defined_terms.definition_excerpt: an improvement may be listed in the name of the owner of the land on which the improvement is located.

_note: Full section text provided; no truncation. Subsections (a)-(g) cover listing of improvements, separate taxation of land and improvements, manufactured home listing, and homestead exemption apportionment.
